SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?continent ?mammal ?weight WHERE {
  VALUES ?continent {
    wd:Q30 wd:Q47 wd:Q81 wd:Q14 wd:Q20 wd:Q111
  }
  ?mammal wdt:P31 wd:Q140221 ; wdt:P5050 ?country ; wdtn:P2048 ?weight .
  ?country wdt:P30 ?continent .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?mammal2 wdt:P31 wd:Q140221 ; wdt:P5050 ?country2 ; wdtn:P2048 ?weight2 .
    ?country2 wdt:P30 ?continent .
    FILTER(?weight < ?weight2)
  }
}
ORDER BY ?continent
```
